purpose: Implementation of PreferencesWindow plus three file-local helper classes: SectionLabel (header bar), AudioChainListComponent (paint-driven plugin-chain list with drag-reorder, checkbox bypass, Edit / Lane / Delete affordances), and PreferencesContentComponent (the actual layout — INPUT → AUDIO CHAIN → OUTPUT → DEVICE SETTINGS). Device combos are kept in sync via ChangeListener on AudioDeviceManager; plugin chain + device changes are staged until Apply.
invariants: Three parallel vectors — chainList.items, chainList.bypassed, chainList.lanes — must stay length-matched at every mutation point. AudioChainListComponent::syncBypassedSize() and mouseUp / right-click-delete / add-plugin paths each guarantee this.
Lane values must be in [0, 3] — popup options 1..4 in mouseDown are translated via `result - 1`. The graph in IconMenu also caps at 4 lanes.
commitAllSettings (Apply handler) snapshots ALL combo state BEFORE the callAsync hop. The combos may be rebuilt during device restarts, so reading them inside the lambda would yield stale data.
Apply is disabled at the start of commitAllSettings and re-enabled at the end of the async lambda. Any early-return path inside the lambda MUST also re-enable applyButton or the UI deadlocks.
rebuildDeviceCombos uses dontSendNotification on every setSelectedId — without it, the ComboBox change handlers would fire during the rebuild and cascade into another rebuild.
ChangeListener on AudioDeviceManager calls rebuildDeviceCombos on every external device event. Removed in dtor; not removed → use-after-free when the window dies but the AudioDeviceManager lives on.
DocumentWindow::closeButtonPressed delegates to onCloseFn — IconMenu uses this to persist device state and release the unique_ptr; do not delete `this` here, the owner manages lifetime.
gotchas: Backlog Fix #4 status (verified 2026-06-01): dm.setCurrentAudioDeviceType at line 704 and dm.setAudioDeviceSetup at line 743 are NOT wrapped in try-catch. setAudioDeviceSetup's *returned error string* is logged, but no exception protection exists. Per the backlog, both should be wrapped and Apply re-enabled on exception (the unconditional re-enable at line 750-751 is correct, but the catch path is missing).

AudioChainListComponent draws the entire list manually (no juce::ListBox). Adding columns means updating five things in lockstep: paint(), getNameArea(), getEditButtonArea(), getLaneButtonArea(), and the mouseDown hit-tests.

Drag insertion math uses (e.y + kRowHeight/2) / kRowHeight so the snap line is between rows. Edge case: `insertAt == dragSourceRow + 1` is also a no-op (line 263) — drop directly below source = no movement.
showAddPluginMenu groups plugins by manufacturer using a single 'subMenu' variable reset between groups. Plugins must be pre-sorted by manufacturer for the grouping to work (it is — line 793).

Right-click delete uses SafePointer + showMenuAsync — the popup is asynchronous, so by the time the callback fires the row index may be invalid. The `row >= items.size()` guard at line 191 protects against this.

Channel labels clamp the displayed channel count at 2 (line 759-760) so the label always reads 'Mono (Ch 1)' or 'Stereo (Ch 1-2)' regardless of actual device width — LightHost always operates on stereo internally.

v4.0.0 added the third (laneStates) parameter to refreshPluginChain — the dynamic_cast<PreferencesContentComponent*> at line 886 will return nullptr if some future caller passes a different content type.

key_functions.name: commitAllSettings
key_functions.summary: Apply handler. Snapshots all combo state, hops to the next message-thread tick via callAsync, applies device type + setup + plugin chain in that order, then re-enables the Apply button. Per backlog Fix #4 the two device-manager calls still need try-catch wrapping.

key_functions.name: AudioChainListComponent::mouseDown
key_functions.summary: All chain-row interaction lives here. Routes by hit-test region: right-click → delete popup, Lane button → Lane 0-3 popup, Checkbox → toggle bypass, Edit button → onEditClicked, anywhere else → begin drag-reorder.

key_functions.name: showAddPluginMenu
key_functions.summary: Builds a manufacturer-grouped popup from KnownPluginList::getTypes(). Already-staged plugins (matched by fileOrIdentifier+formatName+name composite key) are greyed out. Callback appends the chosen PluginDescription to the staged chain.
